General.Name: bet-at-home.com AG
General.Description: bet-at-home.com AG, through its subsidiaries, provides online sports betting and online casino services in Germany, Austria, Eastern Europe, and rest of Western Europe. It offers pre-match and live betting; and holds online sports betting and gaming licenses for casino, games, and virtual sports. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Düsseldorf, Germany.
